joke: I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high. She looked surprised.
I’m reading a book on anti-gravity. It’s impossible to put down.
I told my suitcase there'd be no vacations this year. Now I'm dealing with emotional baggage.
I don't trust stairs because they're always up to something.
I don't trust atoms because they make up everything.
The scarecrow won an award. He was outstanding in his field.
I used to be a baker, but I couldn't make enough dough.
I wondered why the baseball was getting bigger. Then it hit me.
I used to be a doctor, but I lost my patience.
I used to be a banker, but I lost interest.
I know 25 letters of the alphabet. I don't know Y.
I used to be a photographer, but I couldn't focus.
I used to be a watchmaker, but I didn't have the time.
I used to be a carpenter, but I couldn't nail it.
I used to be a musician, but I wasn't noteworthy.
I used to be a tailor, but I wasn't cut out for it.
I used to be a shoe salesman, but I lost my sole.
I used to be a gardener, but I lost my thyme.
